_doc: Facebook group DISCOVERY roster. Meta killed the Groups API in 2024 (can't list-my-groups, search, or post via API) so group discovery is a tracked manual sprint instead. Each entry is a ready-made FB group search; the human opens it, joins the good ones, then checks it off. build_tasks.py copies this into tasks.json; the Worker tracks joined-state in KV (kind 'roster'). For Local entries, swap YOUR-TOWN for your metro.

roster.label: HVAC contractor & business groups
roster.note: National pro groups — peers, referrals, and 'how do you market' threads.

roster.label: Roofing contractor groups
roster.note: Roofers talking sales, pricing, storm work.

roster.label: General contractor / remodeler groups
roster.note: GCs and remodelers — broad trade reach.

roster.label: Contractor marketing groups
roster.note: Where owners discuss leads/marketing — our content fits natively here.

roster.label: Home-service business growth groups
roster.note: Service-business owners focused on growth — ideal audience.

roster.label: Small service-business owner groups
roster.note: Broader SMB owner groups; filter for trades.

roster.label: Local 'recommendations' groups (YOUR-TOWN)
roster.note: Where homeowners post 'who's a good plumber?' — the #1 local lead path. Swap in your metro.

roster.label: Local buy/sell/community groups (YOUR-TOWN)
roster.note: High-traffic neighborhood groups. Swap in your metro name.

roster.label: Local homeowner / neighborhood groups (YOUR-TOWN)
roster.note: Homeowners who hire trades. Swap in your metro name.
